refresh.source: Use the published npm vditor package or an explicit upstream git commit. The current pre-existing snapshot did not carry a recoverable upstream version string, so the next intentional refresh must replace upstreamVersion with an exact package version or commit.
refresh.buildCommand: npm pack vditor@<version> or build upstream Vditor from a pinned commit using upstream instructions
refresh.copyCommand: Replace Sources/OuroMD/web/vditor/LICENSE and Sources/OuroMD/web/vditor/dist from the pinned upstream artifact, then recompute trackedDigest with scripts/check-vditor-vendor.sh guidance.

policy: Do not hand-edit minified or generated files under Sources/OuroMD/web/vditor/dist.
Patch Ouro MD integration behavior in Sources/OuroMD/web/bridge.js, Swift code, or an explicitly documented refresh patch rather than silently editing vendored Vditor assets.
Any Vditor refresh must update this manifest, explain the upstream source, and pass the validation commands.
